stemHtml: During straight and level flight, the pilot starts extending flaps to the landing configuration. Due to a malfunction, the trailing edge flaps on the left wing remain retracted. If the malfunction goes unnoticed, the possible consequence is...

options.a: The aircraft will roll to the right and the right wing could stall.
options.b: The aircraft will roll to the left and the right wing could stall.
options.c: The aircraft will roll to the right and the left wing could stall.
options.d: The aircraft will roll to the left and the left wing could stall.
